capabilities_used.evidence: 2024-01-22: "#BTC has moved to the 6.618 Fib Extension after a Bull Flag Correction." 图片 #5 直接标注多次 "Bull Flag"，并用旗形后的 6.618 Fib extension 推演顶部。
图片 #7 在 BTC Dominance 顶部区域明确画出 RSI 下倾背离；2024-06-06: "Today, we have a MEGA BEARISH STRUCTURE on RSI." 说明他反复用 RSI 顶背离判断风险。
2024-07-09: "we observed a higher RSI bottom. This is POSITIVE DIVERGENCE." 2024-01-22: "Bullish divergence into Descending Wedge!" 图片 #3/#6 也都把 RSI 作为结构确认。
2024-04-24: "MACD Crossover sets #Bitcoin up for next strong move higher." 图片 #3 标注 "Bullish MACD"，图片 #7 用 MACD 回落确认 BTC.D 见顶。
2024-01-15: "Welcome to the Altcoin Season! BTC Dominance has topped. Clear roll-over of RSI and MACD." 图片 #7 直接写着 "BTC Dominance has ended"，这是他最常见的轮动框架之一。

图片 #3 把 alt market cap 分为 "1. Bottoming / 2. BreakOut / 3. Consolidation / 4. Acceleration / 5. Euphoria"，并在历史推进段标记波段；2024-04-22: "We believe that was a wave 4. We now have a similar..." 明显带有 Elliott wave 主升浪视角。
2024-03-19: "#BTC Halving is closing in. Normal BTC cycle gives us, that BTC price should rally strongly after Halving." 他经常把减半后的阶段与后续抛物段联系起来。
他多次把 2017、2021、当前周期进行类比。2024-01-22 把当前 BTC 与 "late 2017" 类比；图片 #5 以 2017、2021 与当前 bull flag + parabolic 路径做周期映射。
2024-06-06: "Better ask - 'Where will Market Yields go'. Where ever they go ... FED follows!" 2024-05-15 把低 CPI / 零售疲弱视为风险资产上行触发，明显以收益率/流动性而非单纯价格驱动。
2024-04-18: "Did DXY top... the downside will bring a lot of tailwind to #Crypto and #BTC"；2024-05-16 继续把 DXY 头肩顶与加密反弹联系。DXY 是他最常引用的宏观确认器。

2024-05-10: "#SP500 and #Nasdaq look like they are on the move higher as well. So - what about #ALTS?" 2026-01-28: "Taken together, this is one of the clearest broad risk-on regimes"，说明他用股市风险偏好来确认 crypto beta 扩散。
2026-02-06: "Russel 2k is showing the way, Market is not pricing in 60+ ISM numbers"，把宏观景气指标和小盘/加密风险偏好连接。
2024-04-23: "BTC's 50-day EMA near $62k provides potential support"；2024-05-08: "breaking trendline of Pennant and the 50 Daily SMA"。回踩均线再延续是他常用的中继框架。
2024-05-08 把收复 50 日 SMA 视为上行触发；2024-01-19 也强调 Nasdaq "above its 3-month SMA and its 12-..."。他会把关键均线收回当作 regime 切换证据。
2024-05-09: "last week's candle was a Reversal Candle - a Hammer with a long Wick." 他会明确用长下影/hammer 作为反转确认。
2024-01-24: "Did #BTC just bottom in Descending Wedge with a classical Throw-over?" 2024-04-24 也提到 "Descenging Wedge and Positive Divergence"，说明下降楔形是高频 setup。
2024-04-05: "#BTC Triangle Thesis gaining strength!" 2024-03-07: "Consolidation zone breakout & push to ATH, followed by a dip to retest"，虽然不总是精确命名，但三角/压缩突破框架频繁出现。
2024-05-20: "#SOLETH ratio... Clear 'Cup & Handle'"。该形态不是核心，但在跨资产轮动图里会用。
他大量使用趋势延续语言，如 2024-01-19: "Trend following is a strong investment strategy!" 2024-10-22: "higher low and a higher high"，明显偏向先判别趋势 regime 再配置信号。
图片 #5 用抛物线式箭头直指 120k；图片 #8 明确写 "Market Top? August or September?" 并把降息后的末端行情视作接近顶部；他会把最终加速段视作衰竭前兆。
虽然不是短线 event trader，但 2024-06-13 和多条关于 FED cuts / CPI / NFP 的帖子表明他会围绕宏观事件调整阶段判断。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Fib Extension Top Mapping
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Projects cycle tops and intermediate targets using aggressive Fibonacci extensions such as 1.272, 1.618, 4.618, 5.618, and especially 6.618 from prior bull flags or impulse legs.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 使用 1.272、1.618、4.618、5.618，尤其是 6.618 等激进斐波扩展位，对牛旗后的中继目标和周期顶部进行映射。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2024-01-22: "#BTC has moved to the 6.618 Fib Extension after a Bull Flag Correction." 图片 #5 也写着 "TOP = 6.618 Fib Extension from BULL Flag?"

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Altseason Phase Model
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Classifies alt market evolution into sequential phases such as bottoming, breakout, consolidation, acceleration, and euphoria, often anchored to TOTAL3 and BTC dominance rollover.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 将山寨市场划分为筑底、突破、整理、加速、狂热等连续阶段，通常结合 TOTAL3 与 BTC Dominance 见顶来判定。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 图片 #3 直接分为 "1. Bottoming / 2. BreakOut / 3. Consolidation / 4. Acceleration / 5. Euphoria"；2024-01-16: "The next phase is ACCELERATION!"

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Historical Rhyme Analog
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Uses prior cycle path analogs rather than exact repetition, matching structure, sentiment, and timing between current market and earlier periods.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 不是机械复制历史，而是用历史周期在结构、情绪和节奏上的“押韵”来映射当前路径。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2024-01-22: "History does not repeat itself - but it often rhymes"；其多张图把 2017、2021、当前周期并列比较。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Fed Cut Endgame Signal
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Treats the beginning of Fed cuts not as the start of a bull market, but as a late-cycle warning that risk assets may peak shortly before recession bites.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 将首次降息视为周期尾声而非牛市起点，认为风险资产往往在降息后不久见顶，随后衰退压力兑现。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2024-06-13: "When the FED cuts - then the Bull Market is almost at its End and Recession closing in." 图片 #8 也把降息与市场顶部时间窗并列。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Sentiment Extreme Overlay
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Adds sentiment extremes such as 'sentiment 88/89' on top of chart structure to fade consensus when technicals are stretched.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 在结构分析上叠加情绪极值，如 sentiment 88/89，作为共识过热后的反向过滤器。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 图片 #6 标注 "Sentiment 89"；2024-04-12: "Everybody is BULLISH #DXY... sentiment is at 88."

personal_quirks.quote: "History does not repeat itself - but it often rhymes" (Mark Twain)
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 经常通过历史结构类比来推演当前周期，不要求完全复制，但要求节奏相似。
优先解释流动性驱动，而不是把价格变动简单归因为叙事或新闻。

personal_quirks.quote: "Nothing rallies in a straight line. Not even #BTC"
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 强趋势中必须预期中途修正，回撤不是否定主趋势，而是结构内的一部分。

personal_quirks.quote: "When the FED cuts - then the Bull Market is almost at its End and Recession closing in."
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 把降息视为尾部风险信号，而不是无条件利多；宏观拐点常晚于市场顶部。

personal_quirks.quote: "Trend following is a strong investment strategy!"
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 默认顺着主趋势做，而不是频繁逆势抄底摸顶。

unique_traits: 他不是纯价格形态派，而是把 Elliott/斐波扩展、BTC.D 轮动、DXY/收益率/降息周期放进同一个叙事框架里。与很多只看 BTC 的 TA 账号不同，他特别强调“Altseason 阶段迁移”和历史押韵类比，并用宏观衰退框架去定义牛市尾声。整体上属于偏多、但在极端情绪和宏观末段时会明显转为反身性和逆向思考。

high_conviction_phrases: Much more upside may well fuel the Rally
we are on the verge of an Altcoin Season
the Bull Market is almost at its End
